title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 32.010 - Director appointed, how
text:
32.010.  Director appointed, how. — The department of revenue is in charge of the director of revenue.  The director shall be appointed by the governor, by and with the advice and consent of the senate, and shall serve at the pleasure of the governor.
(L. 1945 p. 1428 § 1, A.L. 1955 p. 571, A.L. 1957 p. 497, A.L. 1959 H.B. 115, A.L. 1967 p. 100, A.L. 1977 H.B. 841) 
Effective 1-01-78 
For compensation of department head, 105.950
